content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be re-framed as a collective "episodic curiosity bank" that re-weights the value of unlabeled data based on an agent’s entire past curiosity trajectory, rather than just current prediction error. This design turns the generic agent’s core goal of exploring its environment into a recursive self-improving loop where past curiosity drives future memory organization, which in turn drives more targeted curiosity-driven active learning.
